3098c1b478.text: First, open the Quick Settings menu by swiping down

4d0619863b.text: Now tap Bluetooth to begin pairing your device

742134214d.text: Your device will appear here once it is discovered

3189ca5f28.text: Your Bluetooth device is now connected

57205851f9.text: Both inputs are now active in Stereo Mode

e1bfb78d79.text: Bluetooth is connected and ready to use

e358791237.text: To begin recording, tap the REC button

b3c370969a.text: The red dot pulses to indicate recording is in progress

82d5913aab.text: Recording has stopped. You can now review it before saving

5026d16436.text: Tap play to preview your recording

a592146eac.text: Your track has been saved to the file manager

6fdad27a95.text: You can record, review, and save all from the home screen

1c0cb54b57.text: Tap any preset button to select a room acoustic

b7752d2251.text: Tap the info icon to read the acoustic description

4a99b56de6.text: Here is the Grand Cathedral preset

671fba5714.text: There are 9 acoustic presets to transform your space with just one tap

84dc6adc09.text: Use the right sidebar to control the Active Acoustics volume

bc1ccec247.text: Drag the slider up to increase the volume

bd3b290709.text: The volume is now at maximum

f4e4eaf0fa.text: Drag the slider down to decrease the volume

adfb43088f.text: Tap here to mute or unmute Active Acoustics

e6237860c9.text: The volume control is independent of recording and playback levels

c2af14fc19.text: Select a track to begin playback

088e988777.text: You are now in playback mode. Use the scrubber to seek through the track

ad5c1ae284.text: You can scrub forward through the track like this

cf472d3a42.text: The progress bar moves in real time as the track plays

258b5984cf.text: Tap the skip button to jump to the next track

5d4817f3d2.text: You can adjust playback volume separately from the acoustics volume

ac0acdd511.text: Full transport controls are available on every screen

e91eafe76b.text: Swipe down from the top of the screen to open Quick Settings

08b20c8f7a.text: Quick Settings lets you access key controls quickly

042d2c2688.text: You can toggle Stereo Mode on or off here

a7f1a767ec.text: Or manage your Bluetooth connections here

71738bbe72.text: You also have quick access to Help, Net Control, Settings, and Standby

1e943e6235.text: Quick Settings is always just one swipe away

3daae67704.text: Stereo Mode processes the left and right channels independently

275ddf6f74.text: Stereo Mode is currently turned off

416a7ac552.text: Stereo Mode is now on with dual-channel processing active

248719e02d.text: Stereo Mode is now off, returning to mono processing

93107d15a2.text: Please note that Stereo Mode is not available on SoundLok units

e0cb04dc95.text: You can toggle Stereo Mode anytime from Quick Settings

d616ad34bf.text: You can control Transcend from any device on your Wi-Fi network

cdde22290b.text: Scan this QR code with your phone to open the web interface

aa00e1b5ae.text: Make sure your device is on the same Wi-Fi network as Transcend

734541a268.text: You get full control from any browser with no app needed

bb7fedb8c8.text: Even the standby screen can be accessed remotely

6a8215423a.text: With Net Control, you can manage your space from anywhere on the network

e667d3d337.text: You can put Transcend into standby mode to save power

12d6417e89.text: Tap confirm to turn off the screen and disable audio

8b522ee5e7.text: The screen is now off and the system is in standby

35e70c36e1.text: Tap the Wake Up button to resume operation

b9a1c33dcc.text: The system has been restored and is ready to use

e5c5295010.text: Standby mode saves energy without losing any of your settings

5f1ef80153.text: The file manager stores all of your recordings

9e980ee334.text: All of your saved recordings will appear here

202fa29ae3.text: Long press on a track to access the delete option

b5972be768.text: You can organize all your recordings directly from the controller

e54416ae9e.text: To access system settings, you will need the admin passcode

0d6cbe7f5f.text: Enter the 6-digit admin passcode to continue

f903ca7f9d.text: Settings are now unlocked and accessible

2bd5f592c6.text: From here you can adjust network, audio, and device preferences

a67415fc19.text: You can access the full online user guide instantly

564044c02b.text: Scan this code with your phone to open the user guide

8761ef766c.text: Here you will find links to manuals, videos, and support resources

92bf44a0bd.text: Help is always just one tap away with no manual required
